improvement_bullets: Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies, demonstrating expertise in implementing and maintaining data governance frameworks and quality standards.

Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%, directly leveraging deep understanding of dashboarding and reporting tools to improve and automate processes.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), eliminating repetitive data entry, saving 8 hours per week, and improving reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions, aligning with your need for automation of reporting workflows.

Acted as a liaison between business leadership, operations teams, and other key partners to translate complex technical findings into business recommendations during stakeholder meetings, fostering cross-functional collaboration and alignment.

Designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend and informing strategic decisions, aligning with your emphasis on data-driven decision-making.
cover_letter:
Justin Miller
October 26, 2023

Hiring Manager
PayPal

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Sr Analyst, Enterprise Operations position at PayPal. With my background in data analysis, automation, and cross-functional collaboration, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team.

PayPal's commitment to revolutionizing commerce globally and its focus on innovation and collaboration deeply resonates with my professional values and aspirations.

In my previous roles, I have developed and implemented robust reporting solutions that drive efficiency and provide actionable insights. Additionally, I have a proven track record of automating complex data processes, which directly aligns with your need for individuals who can automate reporting workflows and equip leadership with timely, insight-driven visibility.

At Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I independently planned and executed operational processes, including developing Power BI workflows to replace manual reporting, which reduced data mismatches and improved work efficiency by 40%. I also standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, ensuring cross-functional alignment and a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders. Furthermore, my experience building Python automation for weekly reports saved 8 hours per week and improved reporting accuracy, demonstrating my ability to influence the quality, efficiency, and effectiveness of business processes.

I am particularly drawn to PayPal's mission of building an equitable and inclusive global economy and believe my experience in leveraging analytics to improve and automate processes would allow me to contribute meaningfully from day one.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Justin Miller
